stemHtml: Considering two different locations in the Northern Hemisphere, the difference in the duration of day and night is due to the…

options.a: inclination of the Earth's spin axis with the ecliptic.
options.b: elliptical orbit of the Earth around the Sun.
options.c: existence of the four seasons with their specific atmospheric characteristics.
options.d: atmospheric refraction showing the Sun being lower than the observer's horizon.
